name: Arch-Necromancer
description: A decaying mage adorned in dark, tattered robes.

features.name: Dance of Death
features.description: Spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted deal half damage, or full damage if you spend a Fear.

features.name: Beam of Decay
features.description: Cause all targets within Far range to make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d20+12 magic damage and you gain a Fear. Targets who succeed take half damage. A target who marks 2 or more HP must also mark 2 Stress and becomes Vulnerable until they roll with Hope.

features.name: Open the Gates of Death
features.description: Summon a Zombie Legion, which appears at Close range and immediately takes the spotlight.

features.name: Not Today, My Dears
features.description: When the Necromancer has marked 7 or more HP, teleport away to a safe location. A PC who succeeds on an Instinct Roll can trace the teleportation magic to their destination.

features.name: Your Life Is Mine
features.description: Countdown (Loop 2d6). When the Necromancer has marked 6 or more HP, activate the countdown. When it triggers, deal 2d10+6 direct magic damage to a target within Close range. The Necromancer then clears HP or Stress equal to the number of HP marked by the target.

name: Fallen Shock Troop
description: A cursed soul bound to the Fallen's will.

features.name: Minion (12)
features.description: The Shock Troop is defeated when they take any damage. For every 12 damage a PC deals to the Shock Troop, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Aura of Doom
features.description: When a PC marks HP from an attack by the Shock Troop, they lose a Hope.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choose a target and spotlight all Fallen Shock Troops within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 12 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Fallen Sorcerer
description: A powerful mage bound by the bargains they made in life.

features.name: Conflagration
features.description: Unleash an all-consuming firestorm and attack all targets within Close range. Targets the Sorcerer succeeds against take 2d10+6 direct magic damage.

features.name: Nightmare Tableau
features.description: Trap a target within Far range in a powerful illusion of their worst fears. The target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free with a successful Instinct Roll.

features.name: Slippery
features.description: When the Sorcerer takes damage from an attack, they can teleport up to Far range.

features.name: Shackles of Guilt
features.description: Countdown (Loop 2d6). When the Sorcerer is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, all targets within Far range become Vulnerable and must mark a Stress. A target can break free with a successful Presence or Strength Roll.

name: Fallen Warlord: Realm-Breaker
description: A terrifying warrior who carves through mortals like paper.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: The Realm-Breaker can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Terrifying
features.description: When the Warlord makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

name: Fallen Warlord: Undefeated Champion
description: That which only the most feared have a chance to fear.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: The Undefeated Champion can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Faltering Armor
features.description: When the Undefeated Champion takes damage, reduce it by 1d10.

features.name: Shattering Strike
features.description: Make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. PCs the Champion succeeds against lose a number of Hope equal to the HP they marked from this attack.

features.name: Endless Legions
features.description: Summon a number of Fallen Shock Troops equal to twice the number of PCs. The Shock Troops appear at Far range.

features.name: Circle of Defilement
features.description: Countdown (1d8). When in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, activate a magical circle within Far range. Targets within that area are Vulnerable until they leave. The circle can be removed by dealing Severe damage to the Undefeated Champion.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Undefeated Champion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

features.name: Doombringer
features.description: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Undefeated Champion, all PCs within Far range of the target lose a Hope.

features.name: Punish the Guilty
features.description: The Archer deals double damage to targets marked Guilty by a High Seraph.

features.name: Divine Volley
features.description: Make a standard attack against up to three targets.

name: Hallowed Soldier
description: Souls of the faithful, lifted up with divine weaponry.

features.name: Minion (13)
features.description: The Soldier is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Soldier, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Divine Flight
features.description: While the Soldier is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choose a target and spotlight all Hallowed Soldiers within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 10 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: High Seraph
description: A divine champion, head of a hallowed host of warriors who enforce their god's will.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: The Seraph can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Divine Flight
features.description: While the Seraph is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.

features.name: Judgment
features.description: Make a target Guilty in the eyes of the Seraph's god until the Seraph is defeated. While Guilty, the target doesn't gain Hope on a result with Hope. The Seraph deals Severe damage to Guilty targets on a successful standard attack. One target at a time.

features.name: God Rays
features.description: Reflect a sliver of divinity as a searing beam of light that hits up to twenty targets within Very Far range. Targets must make a Presence Reaction Roll (with disadvantage if Guilty). Targets who fail take 4d6+12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.

features.name: We Are One
features.description: Once per scene, spotlight all other adversaries within Far range. Attacks they make deal half damage.

name: Kraken
description: A legendary beast of the sea, bigger than the largest galleon, with sucker-laden tentacles and a terrifying maw.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: The Kraken can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.

features.name: Many Tentacles
features.description: While the Kraken has 7 or fewer marked HP, they can make their standard attack against two targets within range.

features.name: Grapple and Drown
features.description: Make an attack roll against a target within Close range. On a success, grab them with a tentacle and drag them beneath the water. The target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free with a successful Strength Roll or the Kraken takes Major or greater damage. While Restrained, the target must mark a Stress when they make an action roll.

features.name: Boiling Blast
features.description: Spew a line of boiling water at any number of targets in a line up to Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 4d6+9 physical damage. If a target marks an Armor Slot to reduce damage, they must also mark a Stress.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Kraken makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

name: Oracle of Doom
description: A towering immortal and incarnation of fate, cursed to only see bad outcomes.

features.name: Terrifying
features.description: When the Oracle makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Walls Closing In
features.description: When a creature rolls a failure while within Very Far range of the Oracle, they must mark a Stress.

features.name: Pronounce Fate
features.description: Present a target within Far range with a vision of their personal nightmare. The target must make a Knowledge Reaction Roll. On a failure, they lose all Hope and take 2d20+4 direct magic damage. On a success, they take half damage and lose a Hope.

features.name: Summon Tormentors
features.description: Once per day, summon 2d4 Tier 2 or below Minions relevant to one of the PC's personal nightmares. They appear at Close range relative to that PC.

features.name: Ominous Knowledge
features.description: When the Oracle sees a mortal creature, they instantly know one of their personal nightmares.

features.name: Vengeful Fate
features.description: When the Oracle marks HP from an attack within Very Close range, knock the attacker back to Far range and deal 2d10+4 physical damage.

name: Outer Realms Abomination
description: A chaotic mockery of life, constantly in flux.

features.name: Chaotic Form
features.description: When the Abomination attacks, roll 2d4 and use the result as their attack modifier.

features.name: Disorienting Presence
features.description: When a target takes damage from the Abomination, they must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, they gain disadvantage on their next action roll and you gain a Fear.

features.name: Reality Quake
features.description: Rattle the edges of reality within Far range. All targets within that area must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or become Unstuck from reality until the end of the scene. When an Unstuck target spends Hope or marks Armor Slots, HP, or Stress, they must double the amount spent or marked.

features.name: Unravel Form
features.description: When the Abomination takes damage, reduce it by 1d20. If the Abomination marks 1 or fewer Hit Points from a successful attack against them, you gain a Fear.

name: Outer Realms Corrupter
description: A shifting, formless mass seemingly made of chromatic light.

features.name: Will-Shattering Touch
features.description: When a PC takes damage from the Corrupter, they lose a Hope.

features.name: Disgorge Reality Ribbons
features.description: Spew partially digested portions of consumed realities at all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or mark 2 Stress.

name: Outer Realms Thrall
description: A vaguely humanoid form stripped of memory and identity.

features.name: Minion (13)
features.description: The Thrall is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Thrall, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.

features.name: Group Attack
features.description: Choose a target and spotlight all Outer Realm Thralls within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 11 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

name: Volcanic Dragon: Obsidian Predator
description: A massive winged creature with obsidian scales and impossibly sharp claws.

features.name: Relentless (2)
features.description: The Obsidian Predator can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn.

features.name: Flying
features.description: While flying, the Obsidian Predator gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.

features.name: Obsidian Scales
features.description: The Obsidian Predator is resistant to physical damage.

features.name: Avalanche Tail
features.description: Make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Predator succeeds against take 4d6+4 physical damage and are knocked back to Far range and Vulnerable until their next roll with Hope.

features.name: Dive-Bomb
features.description: If flying, choose a point within Far range. Move there and attack all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Predator succeeds against take 2d10+6 physical damage and must mark a Stress and lose a Hope.

features.name: Erupting Rage (Phase Change)
features.description: When the Obsidian Predator marks their last HP, replace them with the Molten Scourge and immediately spotlight them.

name: Volcanic Dragon: Molten Scourge
description: Enraged by their wounds, the dragon bursts into molten lava.

features.name: Relentless (3)
features.description: The Molten Scourge can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn.

features.name: Cracked Scales
features.description: When the Molten Scourge takes damage, roll a number of d6s equal to HP marked. For each result of 4 or higher, you gain a Fear.

features.name: Shattering Might
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 4d8+1 physical damage, loses a Hope, and is knocked back to Close range.

features.name: Eruption
features.description: Erupt lava from beneath the Scourge's scales, filling the area within Very Close range with molten lava. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 4d6+6 physical damage and be knocked back. The area remains lava. Creatures who enter or act in it must mark 6 HP.

features.name: Volcanic Breath
features.description: When the Molten Scourge takes Major damage, roll a d10. On 8 or higher, breathe lava in front within Far range. All targets must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Failure: 2d10+4 physical damage, mark 1d4 Stress, and Vulnerable. Success: half damage and mark a Stress.

features.name: Lava Splash
features.description: When the Molten Scourge takes Severe damage from within Very Close range, deal 2d10+4 direct physical damage to the attacker.

features.name: Ashen Vengeance (Phase Change)
features.description: When the Molten Scourge marks their last HP, replace them with the Ashen Tyrant and immediately spotlight them.

name: Volcanic Dragon: Ashen Tyrant
description: No enemy has ever had the insolence to wound the dragon so. As the lava settles, it's ground to ash.

features.name: Relentless (4)
features.description: The Ashen Tyrant can be spotlighted up to four times per GM turn.

features.name: Cornered
features.description: Mark a Stress instead of spending a Fear to spotlight the Ashen Tyrant.

features.name: Injured Wings
features.description: While flying, the Ashen Tyrant gains a +1 bonus to their Difficulty.

features.name: Ashes to Ashes
features.description: When a PC rolls a failure while within Close range of the Ashen Tyrant, they lose a Hope and you gain a Fear. If the PC can't lose a Hope, they must mark a HP.

features.name: Desperate Rampage
features.description: Make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Tyrant succeeds against take 2d20+2 physical damage, are knocked back, and must mark a Stress.

features.name: Ashen Cloud
features.description: Smash the ground and kick up ash within Far range. While within the ash cloud, a target has disadvantage on action rolls. Clears the next time an adversary is spotlighted.

features.name: Apocalyptic Thrashing
features.description: Countdown (1d12). Spend a Fear to activate. Ticks down on Fear rolls. When it triggers, the Ashen Tyrant causes environmental damage. All targets within Far range must make a Strength Reaction Roll. Failure: 2d10+10 physical damage and Restrained by rubble. Success: half damage.

name: Perfected Zombie
description: A flawlessly preserved undead warrior, peak of necromantic art.

name: Zombie Legion
description: An unstoppable wall of reanimated corpses.

features.name: Horde (4d6+4)
features.description: When the Legion has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 4d6+4 physical damage instead.
